literature_context.mcp_status: RATE_LIMITED/DEGRADED — fell back to WebSearch + WebFetch
literature_context.key_finding: T4 (TUR x bacterial cell size homeostasis) is the cleanest DISJOINT — no paper applies TUR inequality to the adder model or DnaA-ATP counting mechanism. T6 benefits from Ponnusamy 2025 anomaly (LIP doesn't expand) + JACS 2025 ferritin nucleation papers. T1 and T5 are PARTIALLY_EXPLORED and must acknowledge prior art.

2025 Nat Comms paper is adjacent context, not prior art

target_quality_scores.title: CNT × Ferroptosis Iron Release
concerns: Ferroptosis as Field C for 3rd time — domain saturation risk
JACS 2025 ferritin nucleation paper narrows novelty window
Protein shell degradation may be rate-limiting, not mineral dissolution

target_quality_scores.title: Jamming × Chromatin Compaction
concerns: Chromatin is a polymer, not granular matter — Liu-Nagel applies to particulate systems
Bridge concepts are metaphorical: packing fraction ≠ histone modifications
Active processes (remodelers, loop extrusion) violate passive jamming assumptions
modification_suggestions: Replace Liu-Nagel with polymer glass transition framework
Focus on predictions LLPS/gelation models do NOT make
Replace Edwards entropy with polymer configurational entropy
Replace force chains with stress percolation through nucleosome contact networks

critical_concerns: sigma_dot × tau CANCELS if sigma_dot ∝ mu — TUR floor growth-rate-independent for total entropy
DnaA copy number is non-monotonic with growth rate (min at 0.7 dbl/hr)
Correct current is DnaA-oriC subsystem (N_eff=20 events), NOT total cellular entropy
key_strengths: STRING confirms DnaA-Hda (0.962) — RIDA ATP hydrolysis machinery REAL
STRING confirms DnaA-FtsZ (0.920) — replication-division coupling REAL
PubMed: 0 papers bridge TUR + adder model — gap is confirmed REAL
DnaA subsystem TUR floor (7.1%) within 1.4x of observed CV (10%) — physically meaningful
E. coli operates near TUR optimum (1.4x) vs oscillators (10^4-10^6x away) — novel near-optimality prediction
recommendations_for_generator: Use DnaA-oriC N_eff=20 events (20 kT each) as sigma_current, not total entropy
Hard TUR floor: CV_added >= 7.1% universally falsifiable
Predict non-monotonic CV vs growth rate with minimum near 0.7 dbl/hr
Emphasize near-optimality (1.4x from bound) as the novel surprising finding

critiqued.title: DnaA-ATP Counting at oriC Is a Thermodynamically Near-Optimal Molecular Current for the Bacterial Adder
critiqued.key_finding: Genuinely novel. DnaA box count error (20→11) actually strengthens near-optimality. Main vulnerability: noise decomposition.

critiqued.title: RIDA-Mediated ATP Hydrolysis as Landauer Erasure Counter-Reset
critiqued.key_finding: Landauer framing uninformative at 30x above erasure bound.

critiqued.title: Non-Monotonic DnaA Generates Counterintuitive Precision Maximum at Intermediate Growth
critiqued.key_finding: Core claim (non-monotonic DnaA per origin) unverified. Prediction speculative.

critiqued.title: Multi-Fork Replication Creates Parallel Counting Currents with Correlated Noise
critiqued.key_finding: Partially anticipated by 2023 PRX Life paper. DnaA membrane interactions complicate model.

critiqued.title: ppGpp Coordinates Thermodynamically Near-Optimal Trajectory Under Stress
critiqued.key_finding: Mechanism wrong — ppGpp acts via supercoiling, not DnaA levels (Fernández-Coll 2020).

critiqued.title: First-Passage TUR Establishes Thermodynamic Cost Hierarchy: Adder Cheapest
critiqued.key_finding: Citation hallucination — Campos 2014 proves Caulobacter ADDER, not sizer.

critiqued.title: MinCDE Oscillation Dissipation Sets TUR Floor for Division Positioning
critiqued.key_finding: Partially anticipated by Fei & Bhatt 2015 MinCDE dissipation paper.

critiqued.title: Cross-Species Adder Precision Scales with oriC DnaA-Box Count
critiqued.key_finding: Multiple errors: box count wrong (11 not 20), V. cholerae Chr2 uses RctB not DnaA.

critiqued.title: Multi-Current TUR Decomposition — Noise Portfolio with DnaA as Sole Near-Optimal Subsystem
critiqued.key_finding: Extrinsic noise dominates (Genthon 2026) — intrinsic noise decomposition may be practically irrelevant. Independent-subsystem assumption questionable.

critiqued.title: ppGpp → Supercoiling → N_eff Reduction as Stress-Responsive TUR Tuning
critiqued.key_finding: Cooperative DnaA filament assembly undermines independent-site N_eff model. Novobiocin test confounded by DARS2 effects.

critiqued.title: Incomplete RIDA Reset Creates Inter-Generational Memory Shifting Adder Toward Timer
critiqued.key_finding: Logic kill: model predicts negligible WT memory (rho=0.005) but claims to explain Susman 2025 substantial WT memory. RIDA dispensable (Lobner-Olesen 2024).

critiqued.title: Per-Origin Noise Spectroscopy — CL/PG Gradient Creates CV Asymmetry
critiqued.key_finding: Mechanism kill: DnaA diffusion (~3 um2/s) homogenizes spatial gradient in ~1s vs minutes-long counting. Peclet number ~0.002.

critiqued.title: FtsZ GTPase ~2000x Over-Dissipating vs DnaA — Precision Bottleneck at Initiation Not Division
critiqued.key_finding: Robust calculation (410-1840x ratio), all key parameters grounded, clean FtsZ84 vs dnaA46 falsification test. Main risk: triviality + extrinsic noise irrelevance.

critiqued.title: TUR Dominates Berg-Purcell for DnaA-oriC — Bottleneck Is Thermodynamic Not Diffusive
critiqued.key_finding: DnaA(L366K) cannot initiate replication — primary experiment flawed. Effective D_DnaA unknown; if low, BPL approaches TUR.

critiqued.title: Antibiotic-Specific Noise Fingerprinting at Matched Growth Rate
critiqued.key_finding: SOS response confound from sub-MIC cipro (~25-fold SulA) far more severe than acknowledged. >40 SOS genes confound attribution.

Can noise fingerprinting use genetic perturbations instead of pleiotropic antibiotics?

hypotheses_cycle2_ranked.elo_verdict: Elo confirms linear ranking — top 3 identical (H5, H2, H1). H1/H6 tie broken by Elo in H1's favor due to experimental irreparability penalty on H6.
hypotheses_cycle2_ranked.top_hypothesis_criteria_check: Top composite 7.90 < 7.0 threshold not met for early-completion — continue to evolution as planned

session_meta_insights: converging_vocabularies strategy (physics×biology via shared mathematical vocabulary): 87.5% PASS+COND rate at QG — strongest debut of any new strategy
Physical law as bridge concept (TUR inequality) outperforms physical model as bridge: constraint-based hypotheses survive adversarial critique because bounds are mathematically necessary

Computational phase error propagation: ambiguous Computational Validator output (N_eff=20 events vs 20 boxes) cascaded errors to 3 simultaneous hypotheses — distinguish binding site count from events per cycle from TUR parameter N_eff

Diffusion physics kill (Péclet number): for passive diffusion in E. coli (D~3 μm²/s, L=2 μm), Pe~0.002 — spatial gradients impossible without active maintenance; add Pe check to quantitative validation
Cross-cycle learning works: ppGpp kill (H5, wrong mechanism) — correct mechanism named by Critic — successful reformulation (C2-H2 COND) in Cycle 2

Genthon 2026 preprint (extrinsic noise dominance) threatens entire class of TUR intrinsic noise decompositions — design experiments separating intrinsic from extrinsic or use structural comparisons robust to noise partition
Citation misuse (real paper, wrong conclusion attributed) is a distinct kill mode from citation hallucination — verify paper's MAIN CONCLUSION, not just its existence
